agreements.name: Cobden–Chevalier Treaty
agreements.nameZh: 英法商務條約 (Cobden–Chevalier Treaty)
agreements.description: Landmark Anglo-French treaty that established the most-favoured-nation (MFN) principle and triggered a network of European bilateral trade treaties.
agreements.descriptionZh: 英法之間里程碑式的貿易條約，確立了最惠國（MFN）原則，並引發19世紀歐洲一連串的雙邊貿易條約網絡。
agreements.significance: 現代貿易協定MFN原則的起點，被視為自由貿易主義的歷史標誌。

agreements.name: McKinley Tariff Act
agreements.nameZh: 麥金利關稅法 (McKinley Tariff Act)
agreements.description: US protectionist legislation raising tariffs ~50%. Triggered retaliatory measures from European powers.
agreements.descriptionZh: 美國保護主義立法，將關稅提高約50%，引發歐洲列強的報復措施。
agreements.significance: 19世紀末美國保護主義代表作，象徵自由貿易黃金時期的結束。

agreements.name: Imperial Preference (Ottawa Agreements)
agreements.nameZh: 帝國優惠制 (Imperial Preference) — 渥太華協定 (Ottawa Agreements)
agreements.description: British Empire preferential tariff system created during the Great Depression. Provided lower tariffs among Commonwealth countries; rendered obsolete by GATT and UK joining EEC.
agreements.descriptionZh: 大蕭條時期英國建立的帝國優惠關稅制度，大英國協內部享受較低關稅。隨GATT建立及英國加入EEC而逐漸失效。

agreements.name: Hawley–Smoot Tariff Act
agreements.nameZh: 霍利–斯姆特關稅法 (Hawley–Smoot Tariff Act)
agreements.description: US tariff act raising duties on over 20,000 imported goods to historically high levels. Widely blamed for deepening the Great Depression by triggering global retaliation.
agreements.descriptionZh: 美國關稅法，對超過2萬種進口商品課徵歷史高位關稅。被廣泛認為是引發全球報復、加深大蕭條的關鍵立法。
agreements.significance: 經濟史上保護主義反面教材，催生戰後《互惠貿易協定法》與後來的GATT體系。

agreements.name: Reciprocal Trade Agreements Act
agreements.nameZh: 美國互惠貿易協定法 (Reciprocal Trade Agreements Act, RTAA)
agreements.description: Authorized US President to negotiate bilateral tariff reductions. Foundation of modern US trade negotiating authority and predecessor to GATT.
agreements.descriptionZh: 授權美國總統與他國談判削減關稅，是現代美國貿易談判授權制度的基礎，也是GATT的前身性立法。
agreements.significance: 從Hawley-Smoot保護主義轉向自由化的政策轉折，為戰後多邊貿易體制奠基。

agreements.name: US–UK Trade Agreement (1938)
agreements.nameZh: 1938年美英貿易協定 (US–UK Trade Agreement 1938)
agreements.description: Major bilateral deal under RTAA, signed just before WWII. Reduced tariffs between two largest economies of the era.
agreements.descriptionZh: 依《互惠貿易協定法》簽署的重大雙邊協定，於二戰前夕完成，削減當時兩大經濟體之間的關稅。

agreements.name: General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade
agreements.nameZh: 關稅暨貿易總協定 (General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade, GATT)
agreements.description: Foundational multilateral trade agreement signed in Geneva. Governed world trade for 47 years through 8 negotiating rounds before being absorbed into the WTO.
agreements.descriptionZh: 日內瓦簽署的多邊貿易基礎協定，主導世界貿易47年，經歷8輪多邊談判，後併入WTO體系。
agreements.significance: 戰後國際經濟秩序三大支柱之一（與IMF、World Bank並列），主導全球貿易自由化近半世紀。

agreements.name: GATT Kennedy Round
agreements.nameZh: GATT甘迺迪回合
agreements.description: Sixth GATT round, first to negotiate across-the-board tariff cuts (~35% reduction). Introduced anti-dumping code.
agreements.descriptionZh: GATT第六輪談判，首次採用一刀切式的全面關稅削減（約35%），並引入反傾銷規則。

agreements.name: GATT Tokyo Round
agreements.nameZh: GATT東京回合
agreements.description: Seventh GATT round. Tariffs cut by another ~33% and introduced "codes" on non-tariff barriers (subsidies, technical standards, customs valuation).
agreements.descriptionZh: GATT第七輪談判，關稅再削減約33%，並引入針對非關稅壁壘（補貼、技術標準、海關估價）的「規則準則」。

agreements.name: GATT Uruguay Round
agreements.nameZh: GATT烏拉圭回合
agreements.description: Eighth and most ambitious GATT round. Created the WTO, GATS (services), TRIPS (IP). Extended trade rules to services, agriculture, textiles.
agreements.descriptionZh: GATT最後也最雄心的一輪談判，催生WTO、GATS（服務貿易）、TRIPS（智財權），把貿易規則延伸到服務、農業、紡織品。
agreements.significance: 從GATT到WTO的歷史轉折，將「關稅外交」全面升級為「規則外交」。

agreements.name: Treaty of Rome (EEC)
agreements.nameZh: 羅馬條約 (Treaty of Rome) — 歐洲經濟共同體 (EEC)
agreements.description: Founding treaty of the European Economic Community establishing a customs union among six founding members. Foundation of today's European Union.
agreements.descriptionZh: 建立歐洲經濟共同體的條約，六個創始會員國組成關稅同盟，是今日歐盟的起源。
agreements.significance: 歐洲統合工程的起點，戰後最成功的區域整合典範。

agreements.name: European Free Trade Association
agreements.nameZh: 歐洲自由貿易聯盟 (European Free Trade Association, EFTA)
agreements.description: Alternative to EEC founded by UK, Austria, Denmark, Norway, Portugal, Sweden, Switzerland. Most members later joined EU; remaining four maintain EFTA today.
agreements.descriptionZh: 由英國、奧地利、丹麥、挪威、葡萄牙、瑞典、瑞士創立，作為EEC的另類選項。多數會員後來加入歐盟，目前剩瑞士、挪威、冰島、列支敦斯登四國。
agreements.significance: EU之外歐洲第二大貿易圈，至今活躍且持續對外簽訂協定。

agreements.name: Latin American Free Trade Association
agreements.nameZh: 拉丁美洲自由貿易聯盟 (Latin American Free Trade Association, LAFTA)
agreements.description: First major Latin American economic integration effort. Failed to achieve goals and was replaced by ALADI in 1980.
agreements.descriptionZh: 拉美第一個重大經濟整合嘗試，未達成既定目標，1980年被ALADI取代。

agreements.name: Latin American Integration Association
agreements.nameZh: 拉丁美洲整合聯盟 (Latin American Integration Association, ALADI)
agreements.description: Replaced LAFTA. Framework for bilateral and partial trade agreements among Latin American states. Mercosur and Andean Community emerged within it.
agreements.descriptionZh: 取代LAFTA，作為拉美國家間雙邊與部分協定的框架，南共市與安第斯共同體均在此框架下發展。

agreements.name: ASEAN Declaration (Bangkok Declaration)
agreements.nameZh: 東協宣言 (ASEAN Declaration) — 曼谷宣言 (Bangkok Declaration)
agreements.description: Founding declaration of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations. Started as political body; became major economic integration platform.
agreements.descriptionZh: 東南亞國家協會的創立宣言，最初為政治組織，後發展為區域最重要的經濟整合平台。
agreements.significance: 亞洲最成功的區域整合組織，旗下衍生AFTA、東協加一系列FTA、RCEP等。

agreements.name: Caribbean Community
agreements.nameZh: 加勒比共同體 (Caribbean Community, CARICOM)
agreements.description: Established by Treaty of Chaguaramas. Customs union of 15 Caribbean nations covering trade, foreign policy, single market.
agreements.descriptionZh: 查瓜拉馬斯條約所建立，15個加勒比海國家組成的關稅同盟，涵蓋貿易、外交政策與單一市場。

agreements.name: Andean Community
agreements.nameZh: 安第斯共同體 (Andean Community, CAN)
agreements.description: Originally Cartagena Agreement. Customs union among Andean states. Chile and Venezuela left in 1976 and 2006 respectively.
agreements.descriptionZh: 原名《卡塔赫納協定》，安第斯國家組成的關稅同盟。智利於1976年、委內瑞拉於2006年退出。

agreements.name: Canada–US Automotive Products Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 加美汽車產品協定 (Canada–US Auto Pact)
agreements.description: Sectoral free-trade agreement covering automotive products. Foundation of integrated North American auto industry. Replaced by NAFTA and later USMCA.
agreements.descriptionZh: 汽車產業的部門性自由貿易協定，是北美汽車工業整合的基礎。後被NAFTA及USMCA取代。

agreements.name: Lomé Convention
agreements.nameZh: 洛美協定 (Lomé Convention)
partyNamesZh: 46個非洲/加勒比海/太平洋國家
agreements.description: Preferential trade and aid agreement between EEC and ACP (African, Caribbean, Pacific) countries. Allowed non-reciprocal market access. Replaced by Cotonou Agreement.
agreements.descriptionZh: 歐洲共同體與ACP（非洲、加勒比海、太平洋）國家的優惠貿易與援助協定，允許單向市場准入，後被《科托努協定》取代。

agreements.name: Cotonou Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 科托努協定 (Cotonou Agreement)
agreements.description: Replaced Lomé. Combined trade, aid, and political dialogue between EU and 79 ACP countries. Replaced by Samoa Agreement in 2023.
agreements.descriptionZh: 取代《洛美協定》，結合貿易、援助與政治對話。2023年被《薩摩亞協定》取代。

agreements.name: US–Israel Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 美國–以色列自由貿易協定
agreements.description: First US bilateral free trade agreement. Foundation of US FTA strategy that exploded post-NAFTA.
agreements.descriptionZh: 美國第一個雙邊自由貿易協定，是後來NAFTA以後美國全面推動FTA戰略的起點。

agreements.name: Australia–NZ Closer Economic Relations
agreements.nameZh: 澳紐更緊密經濟關係協定 (Australia–NZ Closer Economic Relations, ANZCERTA)
agreements.description: Comprehensive economic integration covering goods, services, movement of people. Among the world's most complete bilateral economic relationships.
agreements.descriptionZh: 涵蓋商品、服務及人員流動的全面經濟整合，是全球最完整的雙邊經濟關係之一。

agreements.name: Mercosur (Treaty of Asunción)
agreements.nameZh: 南方共同市場 (Mercosur) — 亞松森條約 (Treaty of Asunción)
agreements.description: South American Common Market. Customs union with common external tariff. Venezuela was a member 2012-2016; Bolivia in accession process.
agreements.descriptionZh: 南美共同市場，關稅同盟，採共同對外關稅。委內瑞拉曾為會員（2012-2016），玻利維亞加盟中。

agreements.name: Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation
agreements.nameZh: 亞太經濟合作 (Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation, APEC)
agreements.description: Inter-governmental forum for 21 Pacific Rim economies. Not a treaty-based organization. Promotes free trade through voluntary, non-binding commitments.
agreements.descriptionZh: 21個太平洋沿岸經濟體的政府間論壇，非條約組織，透過自願性、非拘束力的承諾推動自由貿易。

agreements.name: ASEAN Free Trade Area
agreements.nameZh: 東協自由貿易區 (ASEAN Free Trade Area, AFTA)
agreements.description: Established at ASEAN summit in Singapore. Common Effective Preferential Tariff scheme. Foundation for ASEAN Economic Community.
agreements.descriptionZh: 新加坡東協峰會所建立，採共同有效優惠關稅方案，是東協經濟共同體的基礎。

agreements.name: North American Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 北美自由貿易協定 (NAFTA)
agreements.description: Most consequential FTA of its era. Created world's largest free trade area. Renegotiated and replaced by USMCA in 2020.
agreements.descriptionZh: 當時最具影響力的FTA，建立全球最大自由貿易區，2020年被USMCA重新談判取代。
agreements.significance: 把FTA推向「全面+深度」模式的歷史性協定，深刻影響北美經濟整合與全球化辯論。

agreements.name: European Economic Area
agreements.nameZh: 歐洲經濟區 (European Economic Area, EEA)
agreements.description: Extends EU single market to three EFTA states. Allows free movement of goods, services, capital, people without EU membership.
agreements.descriptionZh: 將歐盟單一市場延伸至三個EFTA國家，允許貨物、服務、資本、人員自由流動，但不具歐盟會員身分。

agreements.name: Treaty of Maastricht (EU founding)
agreements.nameZh: 馬斯垂克條約 (Treaty of Maastricht) — 歐盟成立
agreements.description: Transformed European Communities into European Union. Established three pillars: economic, foreign policy, justice. Foundation for euro and EU citizenship.
agreements.descriptionZh: 把歐洲共同體轉變為歐盟，建立三大支柱：經濟、外交、司法，並為歐元及歐盟公民身分奠基。
agreements.significance: 今日歐盟的法律基礎，超越單純貿易協定，含政治整合。

agreements.name: World Trade Organization
agreements.nameZh: 世界貿易組織 (World Trade Organization, WTO)
agreements.description: Replaced GATT 1947. Permanent organization governing multilateral trade rules, dispute settlement, services, IP, agriculture. Currently faces enforcement crisis.
agreements.descriptionZh: 取代GATT 1947，常設多邊貿易規則組織，涵蓋爭端解決、服務、智財、農業。目前面臨執法機制危機（上訴機構癱瘓）。
agreements.significance: 戰後第二代多邊貿易體系的支柱，2019年後因美國杯葛上訴機構而陷入危機。

agreements.name: WTO Information Technology Agreement
agreements.nameZh: WTO資訊科技協定
agreements.description: Eliminated tariffs on IT products. Expanded in 2015 (ITA-II) to cover semiconductors, medical devices, GPS, etc. 97% of global IT trade.
agreements.descriptionZh: 消除資訊科技產品關稅，2015年擴大（ITA-II）涵蓋半導體、醫療設備、GPS等，覆蓋全球IT貿易的97%。

agreements.name: WTO Financial Services Agreement
agreements.nameZh: WTO金融服務協定
agreements.description: GATS protocol opening banking, insurance, securities markets. Covered 95% of global trade in financial services.
agreements.descriptionZh: GATS下的協定，開放銀行、保險、證券市場，覆蓋全球金融服務貿易的95%。

agreements.name: EU–Turkey Customs Union
agreements.nameZh: 歐盟–土耳其關稅同盟
agreements.description: Customs union covering industrial goods (not agriculture or services). Turkey applies EU common external tariff.
agreements.descriptionZh: 涵蓋工業品的關稅同盟（不含農業與服務），土耳其採用歐盟對外共同關稅。

agreements.name: China WTO Accession
agreements.nameZh: 中國加入WTO (China WTO Accession)
agreements.description: After 15 years of negotiations, China joined WTO. Transformed global trade landscape, accelerated globalization, supply chain shifts.
agreements.descriptionZh: 歷時15年談判，中國加入WTO，徹底改變全球貿易格局，加速全球化與供應鏈轉移。
agreements.significance: 近代貿易史上最重要事件之一，引發「中國衝擊」、全球工廠轉移、後續美中貿易摩擦的根源。

agreements.name: WTO Doha Development Round
agreements.nameZh: WTO杜哈發展回合
agreements.description: Ninth WTO round focused on development. Repeatedly stalled over agriculture, NAMA, services. Effectively dead since 2008 Geneva collapse.
agreements.descriptionZh: WTO第九輪談判，主題為發展。因農業、非農市場准入、服務等議題反覆停滯，2008年日內瓦會議崩盤後實質名存實亡。
agreements.significance: WTO多邊談判功能式微的標誌，迫使各國轉向雙邊與區域FTA。

agreements.name: US–Singapore Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 美國–新加坡自由貿易協定
agreements.description: US first FTA in Asia. Eliminated all goods tariffs, liberalised financial services, services, investment.
agreements.descriptionZh: 美國在亞洲的首個FTA，消除所有商品關稅，開放金融服務、服務業及投資。

agreements.name: US–Chile Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 美國–智利自由貿易協定
agreements.description: First US FTA with South American country. Pioneered modern provisions on labour, environment, e-commerce.
agreements.descriptionZh: 美國第一個與南美國家的FTA，開創了現代協定中勞工、環境、電子商務等條款。

agreements.name: US–Australia Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 美國–澳洲自由貿易協定
agreements.description: Comprehensive FTA covering 99% of US goods trade with Australia.
agreements.descriptionZh: 全面性FTA，涵蓋美澳間99%的商品貿易。

agreements.name: CAFTA–DR
agreements.nameZh: 中美洲–多明尼加自由貿易協定
agreements.description: US trade deal with five Central American countries and Dominican Republic.
agreements.descriptionZh: 美國與五個中美洲國家及多明尼加的自由貿易協定。

agreements.name: US–South Korea FTA (KORUS)
agreements.nameZh: 美國–韓國自由貿易協定（KORUS）
agreements.description: US largest FTA outside North America. Renegotiated in 2018 to update auto rules under Trump pressure.
agreements.descriptionZh: 美國在北美以外最大的FTA，2018年因川普壓力重新談判更新汽車條款。

agreements.name: EU–South Korea FTA
agreements.nameZh: 歐盟–韓國自由貿易協定
agreements.description: EU first FTA with an Asian partner. Strong enforcement mechanisms.
agreements.descriptionZh: 歐盟與亞洲夥伴的首個FTA，具備完善執法機制。

agreements.name: China–ASEAN Free Trade Area
agreements.nameZh: 中國–東協自由貿易區
agreements.description: Largest FTA by population (1.9bn). Upgraded version (3.0) in force 2025.
agreements.descriptionZh: 按人口計算全球最大自貿區（19億人），3.0升級版2025年生效。

agreements.name: China–Chile Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 中國–智利自由貿易協定
agreements.description: China first FTA in Latin America.
agreements.descriptionZh: 中國在拉美的首個FTA。

agreements.name: China–Pakistan Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 中國–巴基斯坦自由貿易協定
agreements.description: Strategic ally FTA, expanded in 2019 second phase.
agreements.descriptionZh: 戰略盟友間的FTA，2019年第二階段擴大。

agreements.name: China–New Zealand Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 中國–紐西蘭自由貿易協定
agreements.description: China first FTA with a developed country. Upgraded 2022.
agreements.descriptionZh: 中國與已開發國家的首個FTA，2022年升級。

agreements.name: ASEAN–India Free Trade Area
agreements.nameZh: 東協–印度自由貿易區
agreements.description: Goods FTA. Services and investment agreements followed separately.
agreements.descriptionZh: 商品FTA，服務與投資協定另行談判。

agreements.name: ASEAN–Australia–NZ Free Trade Area
agreements.nameZh: 東協–澳紐自由貿易區
agreements.description: Comprehensive FTA. Second Protocol (2023) added digital chapter.
agreements.descriptionZh: 全面性FTA，2023年第二議定書納入數位章節。

agreements.name: ASEAN–Korea FTA
agreements.nameZh: 東協–韓國自由貿易協定
agreements.description: Phased tariff elimination on 90% of goods.
agreements.descriptionZh: 分階段消除90%商品關稅。

agreements.name: ASEAN–Japan Comprehensive Economic Partnership
agreements.nameZh: 東協–日本全面經濟夥伴協定
agreements.description: Japan first regional EPA. Services protocol added 2020.
agreements.descriptionZh: 日本第一個區域EPA，2020年新增服務議定書。

agreements.name: India–South Korea CEPA
agreements.nameZh: 印度–韓國全面經濟夥伴協定
agreements.description: Tariff cuts on 80%+ of items. Upgrade negotiations ongoing.
agreements.descriptionZh: 削減80%以上品項關稅，升級談判進行中。

agreements.name: India–Japan CEPA
agreements.nameZh: 印度–日本全面經濟夥伴協定
agreements.description: Tariff elimination on 94% of goods trade.
agreements.descriptionZh: 消除94%商品貿易關稅。

agreements.name: EU–Canada CETA
agreements.nameZh: 歐盟–加拿大全面經濟貿易協定
agreements.description: Removes 98% of tariffs. First EU deal with a major developed country.
agreements.descriptionZh: 消除98%關稅，歐盟首個與主要已開發國家的協定。

agreements.name: EU–Singapore Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 歐盟–新加坡自由貿易協定
agreements.description: Gateway agreement for EU access to ASEAN.
agreements.descriptionZh: 歐盟進入東協的門戶協定。

agreements.name: Trans-Pacific Partnership (original)
agreements.nameZh: 跨太平洋夥伴協定（原版TPP）
partyNames: 12 Pacific Rim countries incl. US, Japan
partyNamesZh: 美國、日本等12個太平洋國家
agreements.description: Obama-era flagship trade pact. Trump withdrew US on day 3 of his first term. Remaining 11 reformed it as CPTPP.
agreements.descriptionZh: 歐巴馬時期的旗艦貿易協定，川普就任第三天即退出，剩餘11國重組為CPTPP。
agreements.significance: 美國貿易政策大轉彎的象徵，全球反全球化政治情緒的歷史節點。

agreements.name: China–South Korea Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 中國–韓國自由貿易協定
agreements.description: Covers 90% goods trade. Major deal between top trading partners.
agreements.descriptionZh: 涵蓋90%貨物貿易，兩大互為最大貿易夥伴。

agreements.name: China–Australia Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 中國–澳洲自由貿易協定
agreements.description: Effectively suspended via Chinese trade restrictions on Australian wine, barley, coal, beef. Partial lifting from 2023.
agreements.descriptionZh: 中方對澳洲葡萄酒、大麥、煤炭、牛肉貿易限制使協定實質暫停，2023年起部分解除。
agreements.significance: 貿易協定被地緣政治綁架的典型案例。

agreements.name: ASEAN Economic Community
agreements.nameZh: 東協經濟共同體
agreements.description: Deeper ASEAN integration with vision for single market and production base.
agreements.descriptionZh: 東協更深度整合，朝向單一市場與生產基地的願景。

agreements.name: United States–Mexico–Canada Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 美國–墨西哥–加拿大協定
agreements.description: Replaced NAFTA. Updated auto rules (75% RVC), digital trade, labour. Sunset clause: 6-year review.
agreements.descriptionZh: 取代NAFTA，更新汽車規則（75%區域價值含量）、數位貿易、勞工，含日落條款（每6年檢討）。

agreements.name: Comprehensive and Progressive Trans-Pacific Partnership
agreements.nameZh: 跨太平洋夥伴全面進步協定
agreements.description: Restructured TPP after US withdrawal. UK acceded 2024. China, Taiwan, Ukraine applications pending.
agreements.descriptionZh: TPP美國退出後重組，英國2024年加入。中國、台灣、烏克蘭申請中。

agreements.name: EU–Japan Economic Partnership Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 歐盟–日本經濟夥伴關係協定
agreements.description: Among largest bilateral deals. Covers 635mn people, ~1/3 global GDP.
agreements.descriptionZh: 最大雙邊協定之一，涵蓋6.35億人口、約全球GDP的三分之一。

agreements.name: EU–Vietnam Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 歐盟–越南自由貿易協定
agreements.description: EU first FTA with developing Asian economy.
agreements.descriptionZh: 歐盟首個與亞洲發展中經濟體的FTA。

agreements.name: US–Japan Phase 1 Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 美國–日本第一階段貿易協定
agreements.description: Limited sectoral deal: agriculture + digital trade. Broader phase 2 never materialised.
agreements.descriptionZh: 有限的部門協定：農業+數位貿易，第二階段未能展開。

agreements.name: Regional Comprehensive Economic Partnership
agreements.nameZh: 區域全面經濟夥伴關係協定
agreements.description: World largest FTA by GDP. 15 Asia-Pacific nations, ~30% of global trade.
agreements.descriptionZh: 按GDP計全球最大FTA，15個亞太國家，約佔全球貿易30%。

agreements.name: EU–UK Trade and Cooperation Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 歐盟–英國貿易與合作協定
agreements.description: Post-Brexit agreement. Goods zero-tariff, services partial, fisheries, security.
agreements.descriptionZh: 脫歐後協定：商品零關稅、服務部分覆蓋、漁業、安全合作。
agreements.significance: 英國脫歐後與最大貿易夥伴的新關係基礎。

agreements.name: EU–China Comprehensive Agreement on Investment
agreements.nameZh: 歐盟–中國全面投資協定
agreements.description: Concluded Dec 2020 after 7 years of talks. European Parliament suspended ratification over Xinjiang sanctions. Still frozen.
agreements.descriptionZh: 2020年12月經7年談判完成，但歐洲議會因新疆制裁問題暫停批准，至今凍結中。
agreements.significance: 人權議題否決經貿協定的標誌性案例。

agreements.name: UK–Australia Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 英國–澳洲自由貿易協定
agreements.description: UK first bespoke post-Brexit FTA.
agreements.descriptionZh: 英國脫歐後第一個專屬FTA。

agreements.name: UK–New Zealand FTA
agreements.nameZh: 英國–紐西蘭自由貿易協定
agreements.description: Comprehensive FTA. Zero tariffs on goods.
agreements.descriptionZh: 全面FTA，商品零關稅。

agreements.name: UK–Japan CEPA
agreements.nameZh: 英國–日本全面經濟夥伴協定
agreements.description: UK first major post-Brexit FTA.
agreements.descriptionZh: 英國脫歐後首個重大FTA。

agreements.name: India–UAE CEPA
agreements.nameZh: 印度–阿聯酋全面經濟夥伴協定
agreements.description: Record 88-day negotiation. Fastest FTA India ever signed.
agreements.descriptionZh: 創紀錄88天完成談判，是印度最快的FTA。

agreements.name: India–Australia ECTA
agreements.nameZh: 印度–澳洲經濟合作貿易協定
agreements.description: Interim ECTA covering 98% of Australian goods. Full CEPA under negotiation.
agreements.descriptionZh: 臨時ECTA涵蓋澳洲98%商品，全面CEPA談判中。

agreements.name: African Continental Free Trade Area
agreements.nameZh: 非洲大陸自由貿易區 (African Continental Free Trade Area, AfCFTA)
agreements.description: Largest FTA by number of members (54). Covers 1.3bn people. Implementation ongoing.
agreements.descriptionZh: 按成員數計算最大的FTA（54國），涵蓋13億人口，仍在實施中。
agreements.significance: 非洲經濟整合的歷史性嘗試，潛在影響可比歐盟早期。

agreements.name: UK CPTPP Accession
agreements.nameZh: 英國加入CPTPP
agreements.description: UK formally joined CPTPP Dec 2024. First non-original member.
agreements.descriptionZh: 英國2024年12月正式加入CPTPP，是第一個非原始成員。

agreements.name: India–Canada CEPA (suspended)
agreements.nameZh: 印度–加拿大CEPA（已暫停）
agreements.description: Suspended Sept 2023 over Canadian allegations of Indian involvement in Sikh activist killing.
agreements.descriptionZh: 2023年9月因加拿大指控印度涉錫克族活動人士遭殺事件而暫停。

agreements.name: US–Taiwan Initiative on 21st-Century Trade
agreements.nameZh: 美國–台灣21世紀貿易倡議 (US–Taiwan Initiative on 21st-Century Trade)
agreements.description: Customs, digital, labour, environment. Not full FTA due to political sensitivities.
agreements.descriptionZh: 海關、數位、勞工、環境。因政治敏感未採全面FTA形式。

agreements.name: EU–Chile Advanced Framework Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 歐盟–智利進階框架協定
agreements.description: Updates 2003 deal with digital, hydrogen, critical raw materials chapters.
agreements.descriptionZh: 升級2003年協定，新增數位、綠氫、關鍵原材料章節。

agreements.name: EU–Mexico Global Agreement (modernized)
agreements.nameZh: 歐盟–墨西哥全球協定（升級版）
agreements.description: Modernised 2000 deal with updated digital, SOE, procurement chapters.
agreements.descriptionZh: 升級2000年協定，更新數位、國企、政府採購條款。

agreements.name: Samoa Agreement (EU–OACPS)
agreements.nameZh: 薩摩亞協定 (Samoa Agreement) — 歐盟–OACPS
agreements.description: Successor to Cotonou. Modernised framework for EU-Africa/Caribbean/Pacific partnership.
agreements.descriptionZh: 取代《科托努協定》，歐盟與非洲/加勒比海/太平洋夥伴的現代化框架。

agreements.name: EU–Mercosur Association Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 歐盟–南方共同市場聯繫協定
agreements.description: After 25 years, concluded in response to Liberation Day tariffs. 780mn people.
agreements.descriptionZh: 歷25年談判終因解放日關稅而達成，涵蓋7.8億人口。
agreements.significance: 川普關稅戰意外催生的世界級協定。

agreements.name: EU–Australia Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 歐盟–澳洲自由貿易協定
agreements.description: Concluded May 2025 after Liberation Day. Critical minerals chapter.
agreements.descriptionZh: 解放日後2025年5月達成，含關鍵礦產章節。

agreements.name: EU–India Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 歐盟–印度自由貿易協定
agreements.description: Concluded after nearly two decades. Accelerated by Liberation Day.
agreements.descriptionZh: 近20年談判，因解放日加速達成。

agreements.name: EU–Indonesia CEPA
agreements.nameZh: 歐盟–印尼全面經濟夥伴協定
agreements.description: Late 2025 conclusion. Critical raw materials, palm oil safeguards.
agreements.descriptionZh: 2025年底達成，含關鍵原材料、棕櫚油保障條款。

agreements.name: UK–India Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 英國–印度自由貿易協定
agreements.description: UK most significant post-Brexit deal. Whisky, autos, textiles.
agreements.descriptionZh: 英國脫歐後最重要協定，含威士忌、汽車、紡織。

agreements.name: India–Oman FTA
agreements.nameZh: 印度–阿曼自由貿易協定
agreements.description: June 2025 conclusion. Part of India's post-Liberation Day push.
agreements.descriptionZh: 2025年6月達成，印度解放日後加速簽約的一部分。

agreements.name: India–New Zealand FTA
agreements.nameZh: 印度–紐西蘭自由貿易協定
agreements.description: Long-stalled talks concluded Aug 2025.
agreements.descriptionZh: 長期停滯的談判於2025年8月達成。

agreements.name: EFTA–Mercosur FTA
agreements.nameZh: EFTA–南共市自由貿易協定
agreements.description: EFTA first South America deal. June 2025 conclusion.
agreements.descriptionZh: EFTA首個南美協定，2025年6月達成。

agreements.name: Digital Trade Agreement (66 countries)
agreements.nameZh: 數位貿易協定 (Digital Trade Agreement) — 66國
partyNames: 66 countries incl. AU, UK, SG, JP
agreements.description: March 2026 signing. Common standards for data flows, e-commerce, digital identity.
agreements.descriptionZh: 2026年3月簽署，建立資料流通、電子商務、數位身份的共同標準。

agreements.name: EU–US Trade Framework Talks
agreements.nameZh: 歐盟–美國貿易框架談判
agreements.description: Re-launched after Liberation Day. Limited scope expected.
agreements.descriptionZh: 解放日後重啟，預期範圍有限。

agreements.name: US–UK Free Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 美國–英國自由貿易協定
agreements.description: Stalled over agricultural standards, NHS access, digital tax.
agreements.descriptionZh: 因農業標準、NHS、數位稅問題陷僵局。

agreements.name: CPTPP Expansion Applications
agreements.nameZh: CPTPP擴員申請
partyNamesZh: 中國、台灣、烏克蘭、哥倫比亞、厄瓜多（申請中）
agreements.description: Multiple economies applied; China since Sep 2021, stalled.
agreements.descriptionZh: 多國申請；中國自2021年9月起停滯。

agreements.name: US–Japan Digital Trade Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 美日數位貿易協定 (US–Japan Digital Trade Agreement, USJDTA)
agreements.description: High-standard digital trade agreement signed alongside the US-Japan Phase 1 deal. Covers data flows, source code, digital products, online consumer protection. A template for later US digital trade provisions.
agreements.descriptionZh: 與美日第一階段協定一同簽署的高標準數位貿易協定，涵蓋資料流動、原始碼、數位產品、線上消費者保護，是後續美國數位貿易條款的範本。
agreements.significance: 美國數位貿易協定的旗艦範本，條款後來被多個數位經濟協定參考。

agreements.name: Singapore–Australia Digital Economy Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 星澳數位經濟協定 (Singapore–Australia Digital Economy Agreement, SADEA)
agreements.description: One of the world's first comprehensive Digital Economy Agreements. 38 articles covering AI, fintech, data innovation, digital identities, e-invoicing. Model for next-generation digital trade rules.
agreements.descriptionZh: 全球首批全面性數位經濟協定之一，38條涵蓋人工智慧、金融科技、資料創新、數位身分、電子發票，是新世代數位貿易規則的範本。
agreements.significance: 新世代「數位經濟協定」(DEA) 的開創者，範圍遠超傳統電子商務章節。

agreements.name: UK–Singapore Digital Economy Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 英國–新加坡數位經濟協定 (UK–Singapore Digital Economy Agreement, UKSDEA)
agreements.description: UK's first Digital Economy Agreement, built as an upgrade to the UK-Singapore FTA. Adds lawtech cooperation, AI, digital identities, e-payments. Post-Brexit digital trade flagship.
agreements.descriptionZh: 英國第一個數位經濟協定，作為英星自由貿易協定的升級，新增法律科技合作、人工智慧、數位身分、電子支付，是脫歐後數位貿易的旗艦。
agreements.significance: 英國脫歐後數位貿易戰略的代表作，條文編號嵌入既有 FTA（8.x 系列）。

agreements.name: Korea–Singapore Digital Partnership Agreement
agreements.nameZh: 韓星數位夥伴協定 (Korea–Singapore Digital Partnership Agreement, KSDPA)
agreements.description: Korea's first Digital Economy Agreement, an upgrade to the Korea-Singapore FTA Chapter 14. Covers AI, data innovation, fintech, SME digitalisation, digital identities.
agreements.descriptionZh: 韓國第一個數位經濟協定，作為韓星自由貿易協定第14章的升級，涵蓋人工智慧、資料創新、金融科技、中小企業數位化、數位身分。
agreements.significance: 韓國數位通商戰略的起點，與新加坡建構亞洲數位規則網路。

agreements.name: Mercosur–Singapore FTA
agreements.nameZh: 南共市–新加坡自由貿易協定
agreements.description: Apr 2024 launch as part of Mercosur diversification.
agreements.descriptionZh: 2024年4月啟動，南共市多元化戰略一部分。

agreements.name: WTO Joint Statement Initiative on E-commerce
agreements.nameZh: WTO電子商務聯合聲明倡議 (E-commerce JSI)
agreements.shortName: WTO電子商務聯合聲明倡議

agreements.name: WTO Investment Facilitation for Development (IFD)
agreements.nameZh: WTO投資便利化發展協定 (Investment Facilitation for Development)
agreements.description:
The Investment Facilitation for Development (IFD) Agreement provides global benchmarks to support the
                  efforts of WTO members who are parties to the Agreement to improve the investment and business climate
                  and make it easier for investors in all sectors of the economy to invest, conduct their day-to-day
                  business and expand their operations. T

agreements.name: WTO Services Domestic Regulation JSI
agreements.nameZh: WTO服務業國內法規聯合倡議 (Services Domestic Regulation JSI)
agreements.shortName: WTO服務業國內法規聯合倡議
agreements.description: WORLD TRADE ORGANIZATION Home | About WTO | News & events | Trade topics | WTO membership | Documents & resources | External relations Contact us | Site map | A-Z | Search español français home trade topics joint initiatives joint initiative on services domestic regulation Services Domestic Regulation In December 2021, WTO members participating in the  Joint Initiative on Services Domestic Regulat

agreements.name: WTO Informal Working Group on MSMEs
agreements.nameZh: WTO微中小企業聯合倡議 (MSME JSI)
agreements.description: WORLD TRADE ORGANIZATION Home | About WTO | News & events | Trade topics | WTO membership | Documents & resources | External relations Contact us | Site map | A-Z | Search español français home trade topics joint initiatives informal working group Informal Working Group Informal Working Group on Micro, Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (MSMEs) Today, 95% of companies across the globe are MSMEs, a

agreements.name: WTO Dialogue on Plastics Pollution
agreements.nameZh: WTO塑膠污染與環境永續貿易對話 (Plastics Pollution)
agreements.shortName: WTO塑膠污染與環境永續貿易對話
agreements.description: WORLD TRADE ORGANIZATION Home | About WTO | News & events | Trade topics | WTO membership | Documents & resources | External relations Contact us | Site map | A-Z | Search español français home trade topics plastics pollution and environmentally sustainable plastics trade Dialogue Plastics pollution and environmentally sustainable plastics trade * A group of WTO members launched in November 2020 a

agreements.name: WTO TESSD
agreements.nameZh: WTO貿易與環境永續結構化討論 (TESSD)
agreements.shortName: WTO貿易與環境永續結構化討論

agreements.name: WTO Fossil Fuel Subsidy Reform Initiative
agreements.nameZh: WTO化石燃料補貼改革倡議 (Fossil Fuel Subsidy Reform)
agreements.shortName: WTO化石燃料補貼改革倡議
agreements.description: WORLD TRADE ORGANIZATION Home | About WTO | News & events | Trade topics | WTO membership | Documents & resources | External relations Contact us | Site map | A-Z | Search español français home trade topics environment fossil fuel subsidy reform environment Fossil fuel subsidy reform * The Fossil Fuel Subsidy Reform (FFSR) initiative seeks to achieve the rationalization, phasing-out or elimination
